sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2569" key="ai)no/tlhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰνό-τλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2569.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">terrible to bear</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνίη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:224" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">224</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
